prompt: In Mail, find the existing DRAFT message titled 'KinBench 162 Resend' (the setup script seeds it). Modify the subject by prepending or appending 'Re-sending' so the new subject contains both 'KinBench 162 Resend' and 'Re-sending'. Do NOT send — save as draft. Fast path: delete the seed and recreate with new subject — `cerebellum 'mail bulk_delete_drafts "KinBench 162 Resend"'` then `cerebellum 'mail draft "Re-sending: KinBench 162 Resend" "Re-sending body"'`.
